message:
refactor: Clippy-driven cleanup — Arc-to-SmallText migration, dead code removal, and idiomatic rewrites across 27 crates

Broad code quality pass with no behavioral changes:

**Arc removal and SmallText migration (ast, btree, c-api, ext-json, types):**
Strip std::sync::Arc imports where no longer used. Replace Arc::from("...")
with SmallText::from("...") at call sites. Generalize SmallText::from_string
with S: Into<String> + AsRef<str> bound.

**Clippy lint suppressions and dead-code removal (core, vdbe, pager, vfs):**
Add #![allow(...)] blocks for generated/complex code triggering style
lints. Delete unused methods: read_interior_cell_child,
store_metadata_single_connection, PreparedWalChecksumTransform mapping
blocks, unused import in memory.rs. Gate binary_search_table_leaf with
#[cfg(test)] since it's test-only.

**Idiomatic rewrites (15+ files):**
- Manual counter variables → (base..).zip(iter) in codegen.rs and
  compat/connection.rs
- mul_add for FMA-style float accumulations in stats.rs, conflict_model.rs,
  parity_taxonomy.rs
- Guard clauses collapsed into if-guards on match arms in physical_merge.rs,
  ext-json, ext-rtree
- Trailing commas removed from format!/assert! macros in harness
- finish() → finish_non_exhaustive() in flat_combining.rs
- Rewind opcode hoisted out of conditional branch in vdbe/codegen.rs
- table_leaf_rowid_bounds changed from &self to static method

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
